name: gcp-wizard
description: Chrome extension that provides shortcuts to navigate directly to gs:// paths in the GCP Cloud Console.
author: Sergey Romanovskiy

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run copy:static
scripts.watch: npm run copy:static && esbuild src/background.ts src/popup.ts src/options.ts src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome120 --outdir=dist --watch
